conversationStarters: Has faith ever helped you through a difficult season?
Can I share a verse that has encouraged me?
What gives you hope when life feels uncertain?
Do you have anything I can pray about?
Have you ever wondered what the Bible says about peace with God?
sevenDayPlan: Pray for one person by name.
Share one testimony of God's goodness.
Send an encouraging scripture to someone.
Invite someone to read a Bible passage with you.
Ask someone how you can pray for them.
Share the gospel simply and respectfully.
Follow up with encouragement and prayer.
thirtyDayChallenge: Invite someone to church or Bible study.

gospelGuide.title: Simple Gospel Presentation
steps: God loves us and created us for fellowship with Him.
Jesus Christ died and rose again to save us.
Salvation is received by grace through faith.
We respond by repentance, faith, and following Christ.
gospelGuide.closingPrayer: Lord Jesus, I believe You died and rose again. Forgive my sins, make me new, and help me follow You. Amen.

followUpPlan: Pray with the person again within 24 hours.
Encourage them to read the Gospel of John.
Help them begin a simple prayer habit.
Connect them with a Bible-believing church or group.
Check in weekly for encouragement and questions.
missionaryPrayerCalendar: Pray for open doors in unreached places.
Pray for families serving in ministry.
Pray for courage to share Christ locally.
Pray for Bible translation and discipleship.
Pray for new believers to grow strong.
